title: Add product to order via drag-and-drop
description: Open an existing order in Lightning and drag a product from the sidebar onto the order builder to create a new order item
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Navigate to Reseller Orders tab; 3. Open an existing order; 4. Drag a product tile from the sidebar onto the order builder drop zone; 5. Verify new order item tile appears; 6. Verify price is 60% of product MSRP

title: Add multiple products to same order
description: Drag three different products onto the same order and verify all items appear with correct pricing
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Open an existing order with no items; 3. Drag first product to order builder; 4. Verify item appears; 5. Drag second product; 6. Verify second item appears; 7. Drag third product; 8. Verify all three items listed; 9. Verify order total equals sum of all item prices

title: Edit order item quantities
description: On an existing order with items change the S/M/L quantities on an order item and save
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Open an order with existing items; 3. Change Qty S value to 5; 4. Change Qty M value to 3; 5. Click save checkmark icon; 6. Verify updated quantities persist; 7. Verify order total recalculates correctly

title: Delete order item from order
description: Remove an order item by clicking the delete button and verify it disappears
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Open an order with at least 2 items; 3. Note current item count and order total; 4. Click delete trash icon on one item; 5. Verify item is removed from list; 6. Verify item count decremented; 7. Verify order total recalculated

title: Verify order total after item changes
description: Add an item then edit its quantities and verify the order total updates correctly at each step
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Open an order; 3. Note initial order total; 4. Drag a product to add item; 5. Verify total increased; 6. Edit item Qty S to 10; 7. Click save; 8. Verify total reflects new quantity times price

title: Transition order status via path
description: Click through all order status stages on the status path component
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Open order in Draft status; 3. Click Submitted to Manufacturing on path; 4. Verify success toast; 5. Click Approved by Manufacturing; 6. Verify success toast; 7. Click In Production; 8. Verify path shows all stages complete

title: Create new order via Lightning UI
description: Create a new order using the standard New button on Reseller Orders tab
steps: 1. Log in to Lightning app; 2. Navigate to Reseller Orders tab; 3. Click New; 4. Select Account; 5. Save; 6. Verify order record page opens; 7. Verify status defaults to Draft

title: Browse and filter product catalog
description: Navigate to Product Explorer on the community site and apply filters to narrow results
steps: 1. Navigate to /ebikes/s/product-explorer; 2. Verify product tiles displayed; 3. Adjust max price slider to 5000; 4. Verify displayed products have MSRP under 5000; 5. Uncheck a category checkbox; 6. Verify tiles update to exclude that category

title: Search products by name
description: Use the search input on Product Explorer to find a specific product
steps: 1. Navigate to /ebikes/s/product-explorer; 2. Type Electra in search input; 3. Wait for debounce; 4. Verify only products matching Electra are shown; 5. Clear search; 6. Verify all products return

title: View product detail card
description: Click a product tile to view its detail card with full information
steps: 1. Navigate to /ebikes/s/product-explorer; 2. Click on a product tile; 3. Verify product detail card appears on right; 4. Verify name and MSRP and description are displayed

title: Submit support case on community site
description: Fill out and submit a support case with all fields
steps: 1. Navigate to /ebikes/s/create-case; 2. Select a Product; 3. Set Priority to Medium; 4. Select Case Category; 5. Select Reason; 6. Fill Subject; 7. Fill Description; 8. Click Submit; 9. Verify success toast

title: Submit case with minimal fields
description: Submit a case with only required fields to verify minimum viable submission
steps: 1. Navigate to /ebikes/s/create-case; 2. Fill Subject; 3. Click Submit; 4. Verify success or verify which fields are actually required

title: Create order item via Apex REST API
description: POST to /apexrest/order-items/ with valid payload and verify response
steps: 1. Create parent order via POST /apexrest/orders/; 2. POST /apexrest/order-items/ with Order__c and Product__c and Price__c and quantities; 3. Assert 201; 4. Assert returned fields match request

title: Create order via Apex REST API
description: POST to /apexrest/orders/ with Account and Status
steps: 1. POST /apexrest/orders/ with Account__c and Status__c Draft; 2. Assert 201; 3. Assert returned Id and Name and Status

title: Create order via sObject API
steps: 1. POST /sobjects/Order__c/ with Account__c and Status__c; 2. Assert 201 and success true

title: Order lifecycle status transitions via API
description: Create order then transition through all statuses via PUT
steps: 1. POST /apexrest/orders/ with Draft; 2. PUT to Submitted to Manufacturing; 3. GET and verify; 4. PUT to Approved by Manufacturing; 5. GET and verify

title: Get all products via API
description: GET /apexrest/products/ and verify product list returned
steps: 1. GET /apexrest/products/; 2. Assert 200; 3. Assert response is array; 4. Assert each product has Id and Name and MSRP__c and Category__c

title: Create order item via sObject API
steps: 1. Create parent order; 2. POST /sobjects/Order_Item__c/ with Order__c and Product__c and Price__c; 3. Assert 201 and success true
